message: Did you get to meet Guy?
Is it that the windows have been sealed tight, or is the air conditioning broken?
The room has an atmosphere like a tightly stretched string.
At first glance, everything seems unchanged, but,
it looks like you’re holding back tears.
No, I don’t want to hear anything.
I’m just not feeling well right now.
Ah, right now it's Meryl's work and Cindy's work.
Yeah. You were asked by Cindy.
Not directly by Cindy, but Gloria asked you to look for her.
You don’t need to make excuses like that. It’s part of your job.
I want to rest for a bit.
You could at least give me a call.
I don't know anything about Guy.
He must be off somewhere with Cindy, right?
You're always talking about Guy, aren't you? Can you be a little quieter?
I haven't heard anything from Guy.
To be honest, the last time I saw him was at the party.
I wonder what's going on with Guy.
I think he must be busy with something related to contracts.
Ah, it's that kind of time right now, huh?
I just don't know what to do.
seems to think that Cindy and Guy have gone somewhere.
In this situation, it may be unavoidable, but stressing out is bad for the body.
I shouldn't have mentioned Cindy's request.
They look like they're really struggling. It's so disheartening to see them like this.
It's the first time I've seen them like this.
I wish I could help restore their friendship with Guy.
I think the possibility that Guy is going somewhere alone with Cindy is low.
But maybe that could be true.
I have no idea what’s going on.
Even if they say it’s the time for the baseball team's contract renewal,
he should at least be able to make a phone call.
plan to break up with her?
I can’t understand what he’s thinking.
